annotations.description: Sets HEX via key events (fillField does not work: jquery.colorpicker only updates internal color on keyup). Confirms with a synthetic Enter keyup; WebDriver Enter removes the floating picker from the DOM.

executeJS.function: (function(){ var el = (jQuery('{{AdminColorPickerSection.visibleColorPickerHexInput}}')[0] || jQuery('{{AdminColorPickerSection.lastColorPickerHexInput}}')[0]); if (!el) { return; } var o = { bubbles: true, cancelable: true, key: 'Enter', code: 'Enter', keyCode: 13, which: 13 }; el.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', o)); el.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keyup', o)); jQuery(el).trigger(jQuery.Event('keyup', { which: 13, keyCode: 13 })); })();
